title: limonium otolepis
intro: Limonium otolepis, also known as sea lavender, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Limonium otolepis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
